Morsed

Version 1.10.1

In this version I have added support for the following languages ( English, Thai, Mandarin Chinese, Hindi, Spanish, French), as well as fixing some smaller layout issues.

App Icon Generator

Version 1.0.0

Generates Assets for developers apps.

View Project

Spell That For Me

Version 1.0.2

Have you ever been on your phone to say the bank and they ask you "Can you spell that for me". You automatically try to come up with words that match the letters in say your name or address. Not any more with Spell that for me you can save your common phrases and then open while in a call to get the phonetics when required.

View Project

Todaily

Version 2.0

Need More Info? - Tasks Now Have Descriptions
Need To Know What You Added Last? - Tasks Can Now Be Sorted By Date
